productDisplayName: Puma Men Grey Street Jump Shoes
description: Style Notepuma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these Puma Street Jump Mid shoes are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. These shoes are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style.Product DetailsGrey mid-top shoe with synthetic upper, canvas lining, overlays and central lace-upsPadded tongue and innerThick rubber midsoleTPU outsole with horizontal grooves and branding on the midfootMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
